phases.title: Set the base and the reusable kit
phases.detail: Do the write-once work that every later application reuses, so no program starts from a blank page.
tasks: Write a one-page founder bio and a portfolio one-pager (repos, live sites, track record).
Draft three reusable project briefs: Aura, a civic-tech pilot, and a creative or Minjerribah project.
Prepare a plain-English budget template and a short impact-and-outcomes statement.
Confirm your entity options: sole trader now, plus an Estonia e-Residency EU company as a future unlock.
Open the Atlas, sort by score, and star the fifteen shortlist programs.

phases.title: Win the easy, non-dilutive wins first
phases.detail: Lodge the light, remote, individual-friendly applications where the paperwork is proportionate to the prize.
tasks: Submit to NGI Zero (NLnet) with an open-sourceable Aura or Sensorium component.
Submit Epic MegaGrants for the Infinity Engine immersive pipeline (rolling, so no deadline risk).
Prepare a National Geographic Level I proposal for a community-led Minjerribah story.
Match Aura to the current Mozilla round theme and a live Protocol Labs RFP.
Lodge an Austrade Landing Pads expression of interest for one target hub.

phases.title: Line up relocation and pilot pathways
phases.detail: Set up the optional-relocation and paid-pilot routes that need a bit more groundwork.
tasks: Decide your preferred part-year base (Estonia or Portugal for EU, Abu Dhabi for resourced AI, Singapore for Asia health).
Apply for e-Residency to unlock EU grant eligibility (EIC, NGI, Horizon).
Watch for a matching Dubai Future government challenge and draft a solution-fit brief.
Approach a Chilean or Gulf soft-landing team with a one-page sector-fit case.
Contact a QLD university about hosting a Wellcome or MSCA health-research proposal.

phases.title: Aim the big swings and set the rhythm
phases.detail: Position the high-value, longer-lead opportunities and turn the search into a repeatable habit.
tasks: Draft the Halcyon fellowship social-impact narrative for GAJRA Earth.
Scope an XPRIZE or Earthshot fit and identify a nominator or team.
If pursuing EU growth capital, begin building TRL evidence for a future EIC Accelerator cut-off.
Book a monthly two-hour review to re-check statuses and refresh live dates at source.
Retire any program where the paperwork clearly outweighs the prize.

buckets.title: Five best for Aura of Intelligence
Five best health, longevity or dementia
Five best for G.A.J.R.A. Earth / nonprofit
Could fund an on-island Minjerribah pilot

reusable: Founder bio (one page) and portfolio one-pager
Three project briefs: Aura, civic-tech pilot, creative / Minjerribah
Impact-and-outcomes statement mapped to the SDGs
Two-minute demo video and a vertical-slice prototype
Standing list of referees and potential community partners
